ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "city_ascii" TEXT /* ASCII representation of the city name */,
  "state_id" TEXT /* State ID where the city is located */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county where the city is located */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the city center */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the city center */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "density" INTEGER /* Population density of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the city (e.g., by population) */,
  "city_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the city */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the city center */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square miles */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the city was founded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the city data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_county_fips FOREIGN KEY ("county_fips") REFERENCES counties ("county_fips"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_timezone FOREIGN KEY ("timezone") REFERENCES timezones ("timezone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary time zone of the state */,
  "state_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the state */,
  "capital_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the state capital */,
  "capital_lng" REAL /* Longitude of the state capital */,
  "state_flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the state flag image */,
  "state_motto" TEXT /* State motto */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the state data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" TEXT /* State ID where the county is located */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "density" INTEGER /* Population density of the county */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary time zone of the county */,
  "county_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the county */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* Name of the county seat */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the county data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "timezones" (
  "timezone_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each time zone */,
  "timezone_name" TEXT /* Name of the time zone */,
  "gmt_offset" INTEGER /* GMT offset of the time zone */,
  "dst_offset" INTEGER /* Daylight Saving Time (DST) offset of the time zone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time zone */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the time zone data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timezone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city in that year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the population data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the historical population data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_history_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_history_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "density_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the density data */,
  "density" INTEGER /* Density of the city in that year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the density data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the historical density data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_density_history_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_density_history_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ranking */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the city */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for ranking (e.g., population, quality of life) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the city ranking data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_rankings_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the city data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the city data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the data source */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the city data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the city data version record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_data_versions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
